title: A circular authority seal — like a hallmark on precious metal — pressed once by the compiler and impossible to undo. The disc is the complete, bounded contract. The P as negative space shows the inspectable interior: nothing inside the governed domain is hidden from inspection.
conceptualBridge: The authority seal means Precept's contract is irrevocable because the definition is pressed once and the seal's structure itself prevents any deviation.
decision: Removed: avg 3.7 below threshold and concept overlaps significantly with stronger 06-negative-p.
